title: Alliance Authentic Pop-Up
description: Visitors can shop preserved, Certified Uncirculated vinyl records and collectible figures from Funko and Handmade by Robots, while Comic-Con badge holders can also claim and register a free Handmade by Robots figure. Every guest who visits can enter for a chance to win one of Alliance Authentic’s preserved collectibles.
notes: Free Handmade by Robots figure available for Comic-Con badge holders while supplies last.

title: The Remix Ice Cream Social
description: Mixie Cartoon Mixer is once again teaming up with the Residuals Screenwriting Community for their annual Remix SDCC Ice Cream Social. Fans, creators, writers, animators, and cartoon lovers are all invited to cool off with a sweet treat while chatting all things animation, comics, and pop culture.

title: Nintendo Switch Sports Resort
location: Hilton San Diego Bayfront - The Pointe
description: Nintendo will be bringing fans a special experience at the Hilton San Diego Bayfront’s The Pointe, where SDCC attendees will be among the first in the United States to play Nintendo Switch Sports Resort. Guests will be able to try out four of the 12 sports from the game, ahead of its official October 22 launch. Access is first come, first served.
notes: The Rizzler competition takes place from 1:30 PM–3:30 PM. Participants are randomly selected from guests who have already played the demo. Prizes awarded.

title: Percy Jackson and the Olympians Experience
description: Disney is bringing back Percy Jackson and the Olympians for another mythological adventure that begins by entering Poseidon’s trident before choosing one of three paths inspired by Percy, Annabeth, or Thalia. The activation ties into the upcoming third season, based on Rick Riordan’s The Titan’s Curse.

title: Star Trek: Boldly Built Activation
address: 333 W Harbor Dr, San Diego, CA 92101
description: Step into the Star Trek universe where the LEGO Group and Magic: The Gathering come together for an interactive photo opportunity celebrating two iconic brands.
notes: Open Thursday through Sunday.

title: Pan's Labyrinth Fetch Quest
description: Search for three iconic characters from Pan's Labyrinth during this free citywide scavenger hunt celebrating the film's 20th anniversary.
notes: Participants search for one evil character, one pure of heart, and one 'with a name only the wind and the trees can pronounce.' Runs Thursday and Friday.

title: AREA 619 Speakeasy @ barleymash
description: barleymash transforms into AREA 619 with themed food, drinks, and the invite-only Space Smugglers Cantina cocktail lounge.
notes: DM @barleymashsd for the secret password to access the Space Smugglers Cantina. Special menu includes the Zoidberg-er, Drax-A-Roni & Cheese, Pizza Planet Pockets, and Experiment 626 dessert.

title: Poké Puffs @ Cafe de l'Opera
description: Cafe de l'Opera is serving Pokémon-inspired Poké Puffs in Sweet, Mint, Citrus, Mocha, and Spice flavors with Frosted, Deluxe, and Wish tiers.
notes: Available Thursday through Sunday while supplies last.

title: Garage Kitchen + Bar Super Deals
description: Enjoy Comic-Con food and drink specials throughout the day.
notes: $20 Bottomless Mimosa Brunch (11 AM–3 PM), $6 Crazy Bob's Burger & Fries (11 AM–12 PM & 3 PM–4 PM), Happy Hour with 51% off drinks and $3 off appetizers (4 PM–6 PM).

title: Kamon Craft Cocktail Speakeasy
address: Inside Asa Bakery, San Diego, CA
description: Hidden inside Asa Bakery, Bar Kamon is serving Comic-Con-inspired craft cocktails based on beloved stories and animated worlds.
notes: Special cocktails include The Upside Down, Ponyo Loves Sosuke, and Spirit of the Forest.

title: Peanuts Specialty Lattes @ Spill The Beans
description: Celebrate the Peanuts activation with two Comic-Con-exclusive specialty lattes available throughout the weekend.
notes: Featuring The Great Pumpkin Latte and Charlie Brown Lemon Bar Latte.

title: Lunar Landing Bar @ LandShark Bar & Grill
description: LandShark Bar & Grill transforms into the Lunar Landing Bar, an immersive tropical spaceport featuring cosmic cocktails, celestial décor, interactive photo moments, and live entertainment.
notes: Runs July 22–26. RSVP encouraged.

title: LANTERNS Training Headquarters
description: Train to become a member of the Green Lantern Corps in HBO Max's immersive LANTERNS Training Headquarters. Guests complete a series of interactive challenges inspired by the upcoming DC Studios series while testing their courage, teamwork, and problem-solving skills.
notes: Reservations required. Sign-ups open July 13 at 9:00 AM PT on a first-come, first-served basis. Guests must be 18 or older. Includes Guardian briefing, target practice, trust challenges, maze navigation, escape room-style scenarios, a custom Green Lantern ring, Snapchat-powered interactive mirror, exclusive merchandise, and nearby Lantern Recharge Stations with surprise swag throughout the Gaslamp Quarter.

title: STUART FAILS TO SAVE THE UNIVERSE
description: Step inside Stuart's 'The Comic Center of Pasadena' from THE BIG BANG THEORY universe in this immersive HBO Max activation inspired by STUART FAILS TO SAVE THE UNIVERSE. Journey through multiple realities while discovering your hero archetype.
notes: Features portal walkthroughs, interactive story moments, hero archetype experiences, photo opportunities with a replica machine from the series, exclusive merchandise, and personalized collectible takeaways. Open to the public while capacity allows.
tags: Stuart Fails to Save the Universe

title: Marvel Contest of Champions
location: Marvel x Moonrock Gaming Lounge at the Marriott Marquis San Diego Marina
address: 333 W Harbor Dr, San Diego, CA 92101 (San Diego Ballroom)
description: Kabam brings Marvel Contest of Champions to the Marvel x Moonrock Gaming Lounge with hands-on demos, daily tournaments, exclusive giveaways, and the new Towers game mode.
notes: No SDCC badge required. Play the Towers demo to receive an exclusive pin and a spin on the prize wheel for in-game rewards and physical prizes. Experienced players can qualify for the daily on-stage tournament by posting one of the four fastest demo times.

title: SDCC Gaming Lounge
location: Marriott Marquis San Diego Marina – San Diego Ballroom
address: 333 W Harbor Dr, San Diego, CA 92101
description: San Diego Comic-Con's official Gaming Lounge returns with over 15,000 square feet of gaming space featuring open play, console and PC gaming, tabletop games, tournaments, demonstrations, and partner activations from Paramount Games, Mythos TCG, and Alienware.
notes: Features the Naruto Mythos TCG with a daily tournament, stage programming, and merchandise. Experience Avatar: Legends with 25 PC gaming stations, two daily tournaments, autograph/sign stations, QR codes for wishlists and purchases, and social media activations. Alienware will showcase gaming laptops, interactive game demos, and a special stunt experience.

title: SDCC '26 Geek Out
description: Kick off San Diego Comic-Con weekend at the annual SDCC '26 Geek Out meetup with free arcade games, drinks, and fellow fans. Hosted by Giant Size Productions and The Uncanny Experience in partnership with Long Beach Comic Con.
notes: FREE arcade games. Hosted by @giantsizeproductions, @theuncannyexp, and @longbeachcomiccon. You must be 21 or older to enter Coin-Op Gaslamp. Event time has not yet been announced.

title: Isla Monstro: Pardy Harder in San Diego
description: Celebrate the adult animated sci-fi comedy Isla Monstro with a free 21+ Comic-Con party featuring themed drinks, giveaways, cast and crew appearances, and exclusive surprises.
notes: Must be 21+. No San Diego Comic-Con badge is required. Themed drinks, giveaways, special guests, and opportunities to meet members of the cast and creative team.

title: Peanuts x Super7 Pop-Up
address: 200 W Harbor Dr, San Diego, CA 92101
description: Peanuts and Super7 celebrate San Diego Comic-Con with an interactive pop-up featuring Snoopy, his siblings, and the wider Peanuts cast.
notes: Features the Adopt-a-Puppy experience with exclusive 8-inch Super Duper Plush collectibles, adoption certificates, puppy bandanas created with Best Friends Animal Society, Comic-Con exclusives, Snoopy & Lucy mascot photo opportunities, giveaways, and surprises.

title: Den of Geek Fan HQ Event
description: A double-feature, live podcast event featuring Star Trek's Rod Roddenberry and live play and discussion of Rebecca Yarros's <i>Fourth Wing<i> new video and board games. Complimentary drink tickets upon arrival while they last!

title: Paramount+'s The Lodge
price: Free - Ticketed - Sold Out, Stand By Available
description: Official Paramount+ immersive off-site experience featuring multiple Paramount properties.
notes: Standby line available if tickets remain.

title: Robert A. Heinlein Blood Drive
description: Annual Comic-Con blood drive benefiting the San Diego Blood Bank.
notes: Appointments made through the official registration page.

title: Nickelodeon's Fun Flows Here
address: 200 W Island Ave, San Diego, CA 92101
description: The free public activation will include a “Kids Imagine Nation” stage with live performances, games, and entertainment inspired by PAW Patrol, Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles, The Thundermans, and Star Trek: Scouts. Visitors can get slimed at the dedicated slime station, pose for photos with installations themed to SpongeBob SquarePants, Avatar: The Last Airbender, and the Kids’ Choice Awards, or head to “Nickelodeon Our World” for make-your-own slime activities, bubble play, DJ sets, and live raffles.
notes: The New Children's Museum will be closed to the general public while the activation takes over the space.

title: Petco Interactive Zone
description: A free, interactive fan zone experience where fans can explore larger-than-life displays featuring Hello Kitty Truck, Labu'Tique Shop, MaruMart, KAYOU interactive zone, and additional Comic-Con experiences.

title: Marvel Games Lounge
address: 333 W Harbor Dr, San Diego, CA
description: Play Marvel games and participate in exclusive Marvel gaming experiences throughout Comic-Con.
notes: Comic-Con badge required.

title: Hulu Animayhem
description: Annual Hulu immersive activation featuring themed experiences tied to Hulu programming.

title: Adult Swim on the Green
address: Behind the San Diego Convention Center
description: Outdoor Adult Swim activation featuring games, giveaways, photo opportunities and nightly entertainment.

title: Clash of Clans
address: 849 W Harbor Dr, San Diego, CA
description: Step into the world of Clash of Clans for a puzzle-based interactive experience with physical challenges and themed gameplay.
notes: Tickets on sale July 1.

title: Comic-Con Donut Bar
address: 401 W A St, San Diego, CA 92101
description: Comic-Con themed specialty donuts available during SDCC week.
notes: Arrive early. Popular items frequently sell out before noon.

title: False Idol x Geeki Tiki Event
address: 675 W Beech St, San Diego, CA 92101
description: Celebrate the Geeki Tikis 10th Anniversary with exclusive drinks, merchandise, giveaways, raffles and limited-edition collectibles.
notes: Three timed sessions. Guests may attend only one session. Tickets sold separately.

title: Chuck Jones Gallery Pop-Up & Steve Barton Meet & Greet
address: 809 W Harbor Dr, Seaport Village, San Diego, CA
description: Meet Disney artist Steve Barton during the Chuck Jones Gallery Comic-Con pop-up featuring original artwork and special appearances.

title: PopUp Bagels Volkswagen Bus
description: Fresh-baked PopUp Bagels served from the iconic Volkswagen Bus until sold out.
notes: Arrive early. Frequently sells out.

title: Pendry Hotel Donut Bar
description: Comic-Con themed gourmet donuts served each morning during Comic-Con.

title: Kitties and Coffee for Comic Con
description: Spend 50 minutes enjoying drinks, snacks and adoptable cats during Comic-Con.
notes: Reservations recommended.

title: Superhero Tea at The Westgate Hotel
description: Comic-Con themed afternoon tea featuring character-inspired desserts, tea service and cosplay-friendly atmosphere.
notes: Reservations required.

title: Candyland Cafe
description: Sweet-themed pop-up experience inspired by Candy Land featuring treats, photo opportunities and interactive elements.

title: David Baron's 5th Annual Bar Con
description: Casual annual Comic-Con networking meetup for fans, creators and industry professionals.

title: SDCC Away Team Tiki Meet Up
location: Omni San Diego Hotel at the Ballpark
description: The annual tiki 'away mission' for Star Trek fans during San Diego Comic-Con. Fans are invited to gather for an afternoon of tropical drinks and Trek-themed camaraderie.
notes: Star Trek attire is appreciated but not required. Final event time is still pending and may be updated.

title: Comic-Con Themed Bar Crawl
description: Casual annual Comic-Con networking meetup for fans, creators and industry professionals.

title: Lunar Distribution Comic Book Retailer Meet-And-Greet
description: Invited comic book retailers come together to network with Lunar Distribution
notes: Attendance is limited to two representatives per active comic shop account in good standing with Lunar Distribution.

title: Doctor Who Quiz Night
location: Shakespeare Pub - 3 miles away from Con Center
description: There will be prizes (including a $100 Shakespeare Pub gift card) and plenty of fun, and the event will be hosted by the Famous Hollywood Correspondent for the BBC, Sandro Monetti.

title: One Piece Cosplay Gathering
description: Group cosplay gathering and photo session for One Piece fans.
notes: All One Piece cosplayers and fans welcome.

title: Comic-Con Oral History Project
description: Presentation documenting the history of San Diego Comic-Con through interviews and archival material.

title: Disney Lorcana Pre-Release
description: Preview and play the latest Disney Lorcana release with demos and promotional items.
notes: Convention badge required.

title: Con Rangers Meet Up
description: Find badge drops, the chance to win exclusive prizes if you come in your best Con Ranger gear, and the opportunity to trade badges with fellow rangers.

title: Indigi-Con
address: 2131 Pan American Plaza, San Diego, CA 92101
description: Celebration of Indigenous creators, artists, storytellers and representation in comics, games and pop culture.

title: Comic Art Summit
address: 2131 Pan American Plaza, San Diego, CA 92101
description: A day of presentations and discussions celebrating comic art scholarship, creators and the history of the medium.

title: FiLAm Creator Mini-Con
address: 1985 National Avenue, Suite 115, San Diego, CA
description: FilAm CreatorCon hosts a two-day pop-up Mini-Con celebrating Filipino American creators across comic books, literature, filmmaking, and other creative arts.
notes: Two-day event (July 22–23).

title: Fandom Party
description: Annual Fandom celebration featuring entertainment, themed experiences, exclusive guests and giveaways.
notes: Invite only.

title: XLE: Anime-Themed "Party Plus Ultra"
description: Anime-themed celebration inspired by the series and fandoms that have defined convention culture. Live anime cover band Isekai Stage performs before DJs Chuck None, Overkill and Kahn Artest.

title: 9th Annual Afrofuturism Lounge
description: Annual celebration of Black Comics, Sci-Fi, Afrofuturism and Astral Blackness.

title: Lumpia Con - Mixer with Special Guests
description: Free evening mixer featuring special guests as part of Lumpia Con.

title: THE TRANSFORMERS: THE MOVIE 40th Anniversary Celebration of Life Concert
description: Celebrate the 40th anniversary of The Transformers: The Movie with live performances from Knights of Unicron, Stan Bush performing 'The Touch,' composer Vince DiCola, Cold Slither, and Britta Phillips, the original singing voice of Jem from Jem and the Holograms.
notes: VIP entry begins at 6:00 PM. General Admission doors open at 8:00 PM.

title: Mighty Jaxx Mighty Mic Drop
description: Mighty Jaxx evening event. Tickets went on sale June 17.
notes: Tickets on sale June 17.

title: Mark Ellis & Jenn Sterger: Pop Culture Comedy
address: 750 Sixth Avenue, 2nd Floor, San Diego, CA 92101
description: Comedy event blending stand-up, stories and commentary on film, television, comics and gaming.

title: Rainbow Kitten Surprise
description: Alt-rock indie band Rainbow Kitten Surprise performs live at Gallagher Square.

title: Adult Swim on the Green: Night of New
address: Behind the San Diego Convention Center, San Diego, CA 92101
description: Adult Swim's Thursday night programming features 'Night of New,' an exclusive screening of upcoming content, followed by a DJ Dance Party from 9:00 PM–10:00 PM. Part of the free Adult Swim on the Green fan festival with games, giveaways, rides, and nightly entertainment.
notes: Open to the public. No Comic-Con badge required. First come, first served. Nightly DJ Dance Party from 9:00 PM–10:00 PM. Event is 18+.

title: David Koechner Comedy Show
address: 750 Sixth Ave, 2nd Floor, San Diego, CA
description: Live comedy performance by actor and comedian David Koechner.

title: Rooftop Cinema Club: A Star is Born
address: 1835 Columbia St 5th Floor, San Diego, CA 92101
description: Outdoor rooftop screening of A Star is Born.

title: Kevin Smith's Fatman Beyond
address: 818 B Sixth Ave, San Diego, CA 92101
description: Kevin Smith records Fatman Beyond live during Comic-Con.

title: Rooftop Cinema Club: The Hangover
address: 1835 Columbia St 5th Floor, San Diego, CA 92101
description: Late-night rooftop screening of The Hangover.
